description_long: This is a large, freestanding wardrobe with a modern, rectangular design and a dark wood grain finish. The front features four doors, with the two central doors incorporating tall, vertical mirror panels, while the outer doors are solid wood. Each door is equipped with a small, round knob handle, and the wardrobe has a slightly protruding top ledge for added visual interest. The sides and top are finished in the same dark wood texture, while the back panel is a plain, lighter color, likely for placement against a wall. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for storing clothing and personal items in a bedroom or urban apartment.
description: A modern, dark wood wardrobe with four doors, two of which have tall mirrors, and round knob handles. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing four doors, two with large vertical mirrors, and round knob handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the dark wood grain texture and the depth of the wardrobe.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, light-colored back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and depth.
